/usr/bin/ar qc pcm_pdm_conversion_profile.a CMakeFiles/pcm_pdm_conversion_profile.dir/sigma_delta.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pcm_pdm_conversion_profile.dir/sigma_delta_arithmetics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pcm_pdm_conversion_profile.dir/linear_interpolator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pcm_pdm_conversion_profile.dir/iir_interpolator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pcm_pdm_conversion_profile.dir/pcm_pdm_conversion.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib pcm_pdm_conversion_profile.a
